textByHashes.474241be8f7e6abbf589c3b367291809023c9a9b: My husband is serving near the Lizardman Canyon. I'm worried that something might happen to him.
textByHashes.b8ad2e6edabf6c775552d51fde323962d6c2c1b1: And I lost my job last week. I need to find another one before my savings run out.
textByHashes.9f564672c47f3f890d2c978a00dfaaee6b5c4d1b: Well, it's a difficult time for a lot of people I guess. The war with the lizardmen never ends.
